_comment: Pterodactyl Egg — PocketBase. Import this JSON into your Pterodactyl Panel under Admin → Nest → Import Egg.
name: PocketBase
author: community
description:
PocketBase — open-source backend for your next SaaS and mobile app in one file. SQLite, real-time subscriptions, auth, file storage, admin dashboard, and JS hooks.

Security notes:
  • The container runs as non-root (UID 65532) with no shell.
  • Mount a persistent volume at /pb_data — the root filesystem is read-only.
  • Set POCKETBASE_ENCRYPTION to a 32-character key to encrypt settings at rest.
  • Configure CORS origins explicitly in production via POCKETBASE_ORIGINS.

Build the image:
  docker build -t your-registry/pocketbase:latest .
  docker push your-registry/pocketbase:latest

Then reference your image in the docker_images field below.

installation.script:
# PocketBase docker image — no installation script required.
# Build & push your image first, then reference it in the egg's docker_images.
echo "PocketBase image ready."

variables.name: Startup Command
variables.description: Startup command with {{VARIABLE}} placeholders. Override at your own risk.

variables.name: Data Directory
variables.description: Directory for PocketBase data (SQLite DBs, storage, backups, cert cache). Must match Docker volume mount.

variables.name: HTTP Listen Address
variables.description: TCP address for the HTTP server. Default 0.0.0.0:8090 — typically behind a Pterodactyl reverse proxy.

variables.name: CORS Origins
variables.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins. In production, replace * with your actual domain(s).

variables.name: Encryption Key (32 chars)
variables.description: Name of environment variable that holds a 32-character encryption key for settings at rest. Leave default unless you know what you're doing.

variables.name: JS Hooks Directory
variables.description: Path to JS app hooks (pb_hooks). Relative to data dir if not absolute.

variables.name: Migrations Directory
variables.description: Path to custom JS/Go migrations. Relative to data dir if not absolute.

variables.name: Public Directory
variables.description: Path to static files (pb_public). Relative to executable if not absolute.

variables.name: Query Timeout (seconds)
variables.description: Default SELECT query timeout in seconds.
